string.name: whats_new_content
string.translation_description: HTML content listing new features in this release, shown in the What's new dialog and appended to the Help screen. Please do not change the < and > markup.

resources.string:
Virtual Objects

Jupiter\'s Galilean moons (Io, Europa, Ganymede and Callisto) and Mars\'s moons Phobos and Deimos are now searchable with rich info cards and NASA imagery — without cluttering the star map.

Expanded Catalog

Dozens of new deep sky objects added — including the Double Cluster, 47 Tucanae, the Exposed Cranium Nebula and more — each with descriptions, fun facts and images.

Smarter Search

The search overlay now confirms when you\'ve centered on your target.

Bug Fixes

  • See-also links in the gallery now navigate correctly.
  • Gallery and info cards display properly on Android 15+ edge-to-edge screens.

string.name: beta_user_help_text
string.translation_description: HTML content shown to beta testers asking for feedback. Please do not change the < and > markup.
